  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Front Camera ADAS ECU

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7C3
Recv ID: 7C9
Baudrate: 2000000
Func Addr: 11
Func Name: ADAS-Sub

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "6",
    "supplier": "Valeo",
    "soft": "SW2",
    "version": "1.0"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 25857,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU_Overheating"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 59911,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ITS2_CAN_ComFailure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 59908,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ITS1_CAN_ComFailure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 59912,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ITS3_CAN_ComFailure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 59909,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ITS4_CAN_ComFailure"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 25863,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Power_Voltage_Disturbance"
  }
]
